title: Device for creating the illusion of penetration
abstract: A sex toy having an initial, extended state, wherein the sex toy has a first longitudinal length, and a secondary, compressed state, wherein the sex toy has a second longitudinal length that is less than the first longitudinal length. A concentrically arranged tube and a rod are provided within a housing of the sex toy, and a spring expands the sex toy to the initial extended state. The spring is compressed and the rod slides within the tube in the secondary, compressed state.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A sex toy comprising: an elastic housing connected to a tip at a first end and a base at a second end; and a spring arranged within the elastic housing with a first spring end engaged against the tip and a second spring end engages against the base; wherein (1) in an initial state, the spring is in an extended state and the sex toy has a first longitudinal length, and (2) in a secondary state, a user applies pressure to the base such that the tip engages within a user's orifice, the spring compresses within the housing along a longitudinal axis (X) such that the elastic housing compresses and the sex toy is compressed to a second longitudinal length that is less than the first longitudinal length. 2. The sex toy of claim 1, further comprising a tube arranged adjacent to the tip within the elastic housing, and a rod arranged adjacent to the base within the elastic housing, wherein a portion of the rod is arranged concentrically within the tube, and the rod slides within the tube in the secondary state. 3. The sex toy of claim 2, wherein the spring is arranged concentric about the tube and the rod. 4. The sex toy of claim 2, wherein in the initial state, a minority of the rod is arranged within the tube. 5. The sex toy of claim 2, wherein in the secondary state, a majority of the rod is arranged within the tube. 6. The sex toy of claim 1, wherein the elastic housing is formed from a softer, more elastic material than the tip and the base. 7. The sex toy of claim 1, wherein manual pressure from a user drives the sex toy between the initial state and the secondary state. 8. The sex toy of claim 1, further comprising a motor that drives the sex toy between the initial state and the secondary state. 9. The sex toy of claim 2, wherein the rod extends into the base such that the rod is anchored within the base. 10. The sex toy of claim 1, wherein an outer diameter of the tip is greater than an outer diameter of the elastic housing. 11. The sex toy of claim 1, wherein the elastic housing is comprised of a plurality of segments each having a constant outer diameter that is different than an outer diameter of an adjacent segment, and the plurality of segments at least partially nest within each other in the secondary state. 12. The sex toy of claim 1, further comprising a lock that fixes the sex toy in the initial state and prevents the sex toy from being compressed to the secondary state. 13. A device for simulating penetration into a body orifice, the device comprising: a collapsible body having a first expanded state and a second compressed state. 14. The device of claim 13, further comprising a biasing element that urges the collapsible body to the first expanded state. 15. The device of claim 14, wherein the biasing element comprises a spring engaged against opposing internal ends of the collapsible body. 16. The device of claim 13, further comprising at least one rod and at least one tube within the collapsible body, the at least one tube receiving at least a portion of the at least one rod. 17. The device of claim 16, wherein the at least one rod and the at least one tube shde with respect to each other between the first expanded state and the second compressed state. 18. The device of claim 13, wherein a first end of the collapsible body includes a tip and a second, opposite end of the collapsible body includes a base. 19. The device of claim 13, wherein the collapsible body is configured to be in the second compressed state when a user applies manual force to an end of the collapsible body. 20. The device of claim 13, further comprising a lock that fixes the device in the first expanded state and prevents the device from being compressed to the second compressed state.
